title: Rams receiver Nacua is in rehab, attorney says
content: Rams wide receiver Puka Nacua has checked in to rehab, his attorney told The California Post. Last month, a woman in Los Angeles filed a lawsuit against Nacua alleging he made an "unprovoked antisemitic statement" and later bit her on the shoulder.

title: Woods can leave U.S. for treatment, judge rules
content: A Florida judge granted Tiger Woods' request on Wednesday to travel outside the U.S. and enter a comprehensive inpatient treatment facility.

title: Kansas coach Self to return for 2026-27 season
content: Kansas men's basketball coach Bill Self is set to return for the 2026-27 season, saying in a statement Wednesday that he remains "focused and committed to Kansas" and "competing for a National Championship."

content: Expected No. 1 pick Fernando Mendoza threw roughly 56 passes in front of scouts from all 32 NFL teams and more than 100 members of the media Wednesday.

title: U-M's Cadeau treated for possible allergic reaction
content: Michigan PG Elliot Cadeau is receiving medical attention for a possible allergic reaction and is set to meet the Wolverines in Indianapolis later Wednesday.

title: NCAA proposes ban on players who stay in draft
content: The NCAA Division I Cabinet will consider proposed changes to eligibility rules, including one that would bar athletes who have entered and remained in a professional sports draft from competing in college.

title: Judge dismisses Indiana sex abuse lawsuit
content: A federal judge dismissed a lawsuit Tuesday against Indiana University in which former men's basketball players alleged improper sexual conduct by a former team physician because the players' complaint fell far beyond the two-year statute of limitations.

title: Congress, farmer bodies slam M.P. govt over delay in wheat procurement; BJP blames bag shortage due to West Asia war
content: Several farmers’ organisations, including the Bharatiya Kisan Sangh (BKS) have also criticised the government and demanded the procurement be started soon

title: Census 2027: How to do self-enumeration - a step-by-step guide
content: Census 2027 will be completely digital, with enumerators recording data from house visits on mobile applications.

content: Operation Sindoor demonstrated exemplary readiness and resolve of the Indian Navy, as its units undertook swift deployment and maintained a highly aggressive posture throughout the period, says Mr. Tripathi

title: Rajya Sabha clears Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code Amendments

title: Parliament may go into recess, meet on April 16
content: According to sources, the Lok Sabha Secretariat was asked to look at precedents when a session of Parliament was extended beyond its schedule to accommodate additional legislative business.

title: Kerala polls: Telangana CM Revanth Reddy takes a dig at Pinarayi Vijayan with film dialogue during UDF roadshow
content: “Your time is over. Your expiry date is over. You don’t have any time to continue. Now, the UDF’s time has come,” Mr. Reddy said during the roadshow

title: J&K Assembly admits Bill on reversing amendments made to Land Grants Act by L-G in 2022
content: The Government would like the House to deliberate on the matter in detail. After that, the Government will take a decision on whether to support this Bill or not. Therefore, at this stage, I will not oppose its introduction,” says  J&K Chief Minister Omar Abdullah

title: Panchayati Raj, local body elections in Rajasthan set to get delayed
content: Population data submitted from districts to the commission were found to be “incomplete and inaccurate” in several instances, says sources

title: M.P. Congress MLA convicted in fraud case; likely to lose legislative membership
content: The court sent the legislator and another accused, Raghuvir Sharan Prajapati, to Tihar Jail and is likely to pronounce the sentence

title: Delhi court dismiss defamation case filed by wife of AAP’s Somnath Bharti against Nirmala Sitharaman

title: PM’s policies pushing country deeper into crisis, says Priyanka
content: Addressing party rallies in eastern Assam, the Congress leader says the people are tired of the ‘mafia and syndicate rule’ of the BJP-led government

title: Lok Sabha passes Jan Vishwas amendment Bill
content: It seeks to amend certain provisions in different laws for decriminalising and rationalising minor offences to further promote ease of doing business and living

title: In Bodoland, fight for peace, identity ‘unites’ political rivals BPF and UPPL
content: In the Bodoland Territorial Region, BPF in alliance with the BJP is taking on the UPPL, which till a few months ago was with the saffron party; while the UPPL blames the BPF for communal tension in the region, both concur on the need to protect the Bodo identity and have lasting peace

title: 55,000 households use Census self-enumeration portal on day one
content: In the first phase, comprehensive information on the condition of housing, household amenities and assets possessed will be collected, the Home Ministry said

title: Hyderabad sees surge in customer enquiries for PNG connections
content: The rising demand coupled with the Centre’s push for PNG has meant City Gas Distribution entities in the country such as BGL doubling down on efforts to ramp up the pipeline network

title: T.N. Assembly election: Palaniswami dubs DMK government ‘anti-farmer’
content: He says the five-year term of the DMK government has been marked by a sharp rise in the prices of rice and other essential commodities, and steep hike in property tax and electricity tariff, which affected the common people.

title: DMK has always safeguarded interests of minorities in Tamil Nadu, says Udhayanidhi
content: Udhayanidhi Stalin assured voters that existing welfare schemes will be enhanced during the Dravidian Model 2.0 government by implementing poll promises of the DMK

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026 | There was no young candidate on NCP’s final list to challenge my candidature in Elathur: A.K. Saseendran
content: Forest Minister A.K. Saseendran, one of the seniormost leaders of the Left Democratic Front (LDF), is contesting from Elathur for the fourth consecutive time. In an interview with The Hindu, he responds to criticism about his decision to contest again instead of making way for a younger candidate, as well as the ongoing protest by a section of upland farmers who have fielded their own candidate against him, citing his alleged failures to address their concerns amid rising human-wildlife conflicts

title: Minister Duriamurugan’s vehicle inspected by election squad in Vellore
content: The Minister was said to have been accompanied by his son and Vellore MP D.M. Kathir Anand and Arakkonam DMK MP S. Jagathrakshakan

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: UDF team alleges that they were prevented from campaigning at Cheruvathur bus stand
content: Sandeep Warrier, the United Democratic Front candidate in Cheruvathur,  who reached the spot upon receiving information on the incident was allegedly blocked by CPI(M)-CITU workers

title: Powerful 7.4 Magnitude Earthquake Hits Indonesia, Tsunami Warning Issued
content: Indonesia Earthquake: The quake, which was initially recorded at a magnitude of 7.8, hit at a local time of 6:48 am (2248 GMT) in the Molucca Sea, USGS said.

title: "Horrible, Evil Genius": Trump Recalls Killing Of Iran's Qasem Soleimani
content: Qasem Soleimani, the former Iran's Revolutionary Guards commander, was killed in a US strike in January 2020.

title: M Kharge Questions PM's Absence From All-Party Meet, Kiren Rijiju Replies
content: Rajya Sabha witnessed heated exchanges between Mallikarjun Kharge and Kiren Rijiju over Middle East crisis discussion.

content: The US president said it had been "just one month since the United States military began Operation Epic Fury targeting the world's number one state sponsor of terror, Iran", claiming rapid battlefield gains.

title: Trump Says US Won't Let Arab Allies, Israel "Get Hurt Or Fail" In Iran War
content: Trump's White House Address On the Middle East War: Iran's Navy Gone, Air Force In Ruins, Leaders Are Dead

title: Oil Jumps As Trump Shifts Hormuz Closure Burden To Oil-Dependent Nations
content: In his speech, US President Donald Trump said the United States does not need oil from the Strait of Hormuz route.

title: "We Don't Need Oil From Hormuz, Those Who Need It Must Protect It": Trump
content: Trump on Iran war: We don't need oil from Strait of Hormuz, countries that need it must protect the oil they depend on

title: "Iran Was Laughing At Us": Trump On Obama Signing Nuclear Deal
content: Donald Trump said that "Iran was laughing at us" after the deal (referring to JCPOA) while continuing its attempt to build a nuclear weapon.

title: Andhra Chief Minister Lauds Passage Of Amaravati Bill In Lok Sabha
content: Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister N Chandrababu Naidu on Wednesday described the passage of the Amaravati Bill in the Lok Sabha as a moment of honour for people.

title: Delhi Court Dismisses Defamation Case Against Nirmala Sitharaman
content: A Delhi court on Wednesday dismissed a criminal defamation complaint filed by Lipika Mitra, wife of former Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) MLA Somnath Bharti, against Union Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman.

title: China's "Peace Plan" Likely To Thwart Pak's High-Profile US Plans On Iran
content: China has been watching with quiet unease, if not outright discomfort, as Pakistan Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Army Chief Field Marshal Asim Munir extended Islamabad's outreach to the United States.

title: 14 Bangladeshi Nationals Arrested In Bengal, Fake Aadhaar Cards Recovered
content: The Railway Protection Force (RPF) at Jalpaiguri Road station, West Bengal, apprehended 14 Bangladeshi nationals, including four women and four minors, officials said.

title: Delhi Police Stop Cremation, Seize Woman's Body Over Suspicious Death
content: According to the police, the call was received at the Hari Nagar police station around 2 pm, prompting immediate deployment of a team to verify the allegations.

title: Iran Calls US Demands "Maximalist And Irrational' Ahead Of Trump War Speech
content: Iran said Thursday that Washington's demands were "maximalist and irrational" and denied any negotiations were under way on a ceasefire to end the war in the Middle East.

title: US Israel Iran War LIVE: Trump To Address The Nation Shortly On Iran War
content: US Israel Iran War News LIVE Updates: The United States and Israel continue to strike Iran, whose retaliatory attacks have targeted Israel and neighboring Gulf Arab states. More than 3,000 people have been killed.

title: "Trump Is Impatient": JD Vance Issues "Stern Message" To Iran Over Deal
content: JD Vance warned that there would be "increased pressure" on the country's "infrastructure sites" "unless the Iranians made a deal."

title: UP Couple Dies By Suicide After Families Oppose Marriage: Cops
content: According to the police, the young couple, in their early 20s, took the extreme step as their families opposed to their marriage.

title: Boxing divisional rankings: Moses Itauma crashes into heavyweight top 5
content: Moses Itauma disposed of Jermaine Franklin Jr. to move up at heavyweight. Here are the latest ESPN divisional rankings.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool eye Conceição as Salah replacement
content: Juventus winger Francisco Conceição has emerged as an option to replace Mohamed Salah at Liverpool. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Why new rules have Max Verstappen on the brink of walking away from F1
content: Max Verstappen predicted F1's new rule set would underwhelm, and 2026 is proving him correct, so much so that he might just quit the sport entirely.

title: Karnataka Minister M.B. Patil writes to Centre seeking express train between Bengaluru and Vijayapura
content: With the completion of the 9.6-km double line railway work between Almatti and Wandal, which has been opened for traffic since March 25, Karnataka Minister M.B. Patil has sought the introduction of a long-pending express train service between Bengaluru and Vijayapura

title: Amit Shah asks Manipur CM to accelerate peace process, approves formation of all-woman police battalion
content: Zomi community leaders warn of phased and coordinated agitations over “delay in justice” for MLA who died following a mob assault.

title: Karnataka Transport Department misses revenue target by 14%
content: Tax concessions provided to electric vehicle registrations and concessions extended to certain categories of vehicles dragged down the revenue of the Transport Department as it missed the target by 14%

title: GST collection in Karnataka grows by 11.6%
content: In a year where the GST rate rationalisation threw up a huge challenge, Karnataka received ₹87,256 crore as part of the SGST, and the SGST portion of the IGST settlement during 2025-2026

title: Evangelical Fellowship calls for consultations on FCRA regulations
content: It calls for the law to be upheld “in ways that are fair, proportionate, and do not undermine institutions serving vulnerable communities”

title: Karnataka’s Stamps and Registrations Department sees revenue up, but target not met
content: Amid problems in the registration of properties over e-khata, revenue collection from registrations increased by 13.31% even as the Department of Stamps and Registration failed to meet the target set for the financial year

title: 11.94% increase in Excise revenue in Karnataka despite drop in beer sales
content: Karnataka reported 11.94% increase in Excise revenue collection despite a steep drop in the sale of beer, which has been attributed to a long spell of rain coupled with floods and a marginal dip in sale of Indian Made Liquor

title: Commercial LPG prices hiked 10%, jet fuel rates up 9% for domestic airlines
content: ATF rates for international flights more than doubled, prompting IndiGo to add a fuel surcharge of ₹10,000 on long-haul routes; Centre says OMCs are still absorbing losses due to the surge in global crude rates

title: Bring back J&K resident’s son deported to Pakistan, Jammu and Kashmir High Court tells Home Ministry
content: Father says that after the Pahalgam attack, police raided his house, forcibly detained his son and deported him to Pakistan

content: Can PNG replace LPG for cooking? Why has LPG been preferred so far? How is LNG transported and used? What is holding back PNG expansion? Can domestic production meet demand? Will PNG reduce LPG import dependence?

title: Assembly Election highlights: PM Modi speaks in Assam, Rajnath Singh holds campaign in Kerala, and more
content: Addressing poll rallies, PM claims Congress plans to enact communal violence law that is unfair to Hindus; vows to protect Assamese identity, predicts a hat-trick win for NDA in Assembly election

title: Doctor couple charged under UAPA in Kashmir for spreading ‘misinformation on social media’
content: The accused, according to the police, were also involved in uploading and circulating content intended to create disharmony and criminal ill-will among different religious groups

title: Modi plans FTA push with Europe this summer, fast-tracking implementation on cards
content: Officials finalising dates for PM travel to Nordic Summit in Norway, G-7 in France and to Netherlands in May and June

title: Iran endgame, gas prices, Hormuz crisis & more: Key takeaways from Trump's big address
content: President Trump announced Operation Epic Fury is nearing completion, stating the Iran conflict will end within two to three weeks. He advised nations facing oil crises to purchase from the US or seize oil from the Strait of Hormuz, emphasizing Iran's untrustworthiness and its history of attacks.

title: PSL in turmoil: Fakhar Zaman challenges PCB in ball-tampering row
content: Fakhar Zaman faces a two-match ban in the Pakistan Super League for allegedly altering the ball's condition. The Pakistan Cricket Board confirmed the punishment. Fakhar denies the charges and has formally challenged the suspension. This incident adds to the Lahore Qalandars' recent off-field issues, including fines for captain Shaheen Shah Afridi and bowler Naseem Shah.

title: 'Buy from US or take it from the Strait': Trump's suggestion to nations hit by oil shock
content: US President Donald Trump offered a solution to countries facing fuel shortages. He advised them to purchase oil from the United States. Alternatively, he suggested they take stronger actions to secure their own supplies. Trump stated Iran's military capabilities have been significantly weakened. This comes as the Middle East crisis continues, impacting global energy flows.

title: Tim Cook shares what Steve Jobs told him in memo to employees on Apple's 50th anniversary
content: Apple CEO Tim Cook marked the company's 50th anniversary with a memo, echoing Steve Jobs' belief that individuals can shape the world. He highlighted Apple's growth from a garage prototype to 2.5 billion active devices, emphasizing employee dedication to a mission larger than themselves. Cook expressed excitement for future opportunities, positioning Apple for continued innovation.

title: Arjun Tendulkar opens up on wife Saaniya: 'She never said anything'
content: Cricket legend Sachin Tendulkar's son Arjun has opened up about his simple life, saying his wife Saaniya Chandhok has been supportive. Now with Lucknow Super Giants, he remains unfazed by criticism and focused on proving himself. Inspired by Yuvraj Singh, he aims to build his own identity beyond Sachin Tendulkar’s legacy.

title: Oracle layoffs: Company sets this severance condition for laid-off employees
content: Oracle has started its largest-ever layoffs, impacting thousands globally. Employees must sign termination documents via DocuSign to receive severance, which appears less generous than competitors.  These cuts, potentially reaching 30,000, aim to fund a massive AI data center expansion, a move that has placed the company under significant financial strain.

title: Monkey keeps vigil through night by Bengaluru woman’s body in poignant ‘farewell’
content: A touching scene unfolded in Rayara Doddi village. An 85-year-old woman, V Parvatamma, passed away. A monkey, known to be fed by her, stayed by her body through the night. It appeared to grieve, refusing to leave even as people gathered. The animal's unusual vigil continued until cremation preparations began. This heartwarming event was captured on video and shared widely.

title: Happy Hanuman Jayanti 2026 : Best quotes, wishes, images and greetings to share
content: Hanuman Jayanti, celebrated on the full moon of Chaitra, honors Lord Hanuman's birth on April 2, 2026. This festival commemorates his unwavering loyalty, superhuman strength, and selfless service, as depicted in the Ramayana. Devotees observe the day with fasting, temple visits, and offerings, drawing inspiration from Hanuman's devotion to Lord Rama.

title: Candidates Chess: How risk-averse Indians self-sabotaged in Round 4
content: India's chess contingent faced a disappointing Round 4 at the Candidates tournament, with R Praggnanandhaa and R Vaishali securing draws while Divya Deshmukh suffered a significant loss. Praggnanandhaa's game was described as uncharacteristically subdued, and Vaishali narrowly escaped a difficult position. Deshmukh's experimental play led to fundamental errors and a decisive defeat.

title: Salesforce CEO Benioff shares when Microsoft stopped company from investing in OpenAI
content: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff revealed Microsoft blocked their investment in OpenAI. Despite this, Salesforce secured stakes in AI firms like Cohere and Mistral, aiming to lead in enterprise AI. Benioff criticized Microsoft's competitive tactics, questioning their AI spending's impact. This highlights growing concerns over Microsoft's influence in the AI sector.

title: From matte laminates to glassy surfaces: 6 materials that make a home look luxurious
content: Indian interiors are embracing a new era of luxury, prioritizing calm surfaces and dependable materials.  Designers are focusing on engineered solutions, inspired by German precision, that blend subtle aesthetics with robust performance.  From fingerprint-resistant matte laminates to seamless solid surfaces and precision roller shutters, these innovations ensure enduring elegance and functionality in homes and workspaces.

title: Dallas Cowboys and Kansas City Chiefs linked in bold first-round draft shake-up
content: The Dallas Cowboys are considering a proposed draft trade with the Kansas City Chiefs that would move them from pick No. 20 to No. 29 while gaining extra mid-round selections. The idea boosts depth, especially on defense, but risks missing elite talent. Dallas must decide between immediate impact players or building roster depth.

title: Oil prices climb after Trump's speech, brent crude reaches $106, WTI tops $103
content: Oil markets experienced significant volatility following President Trump's address. Initially dropping, prices surged after Trump urged other nations to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz, emphasizing Iran's weakened state and military setbacks. The speech outlined US objectives and suggested alternative fuel sources.

title: Celtics vs Heat injury update: Who's playing, injured, team stats, and more
content: The Boston Celtics, leading their division, play the Miami Heat at Kaseya Center. Miami needs this win to secure a play-in spot. Both teams have injury concerns. Boston has dominated the season series. The Celtics are favored to win, but Miami's home advantage and determination could make it a close contest.

title: ‘Dhurandhar: The Revenge’ mints over Rs 1,460 crore worldwide in 14 days
content: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' has achieved a remarkable Rs 1460 crore gross worldwide in just 14 days. The espionage drama, directed by Aditya Dhar, has garnered Rs 920.02 crore net in India, surpassing its prequel. Despite a slight dip, the film continues its impressive box office run, captivating audiences with its thrilling narrative.

title: ATF price up 25% after flip-flops; domestic flyers spared steep rise in fares for now
content: Domestic airfares may see relief as oil companies limited aviation fuel price hikes to 25%, with the government warning of intervention against unreasonable fare increases. However, international tickets to western destinations are expected to rise further due to longer flight routes, as jet fuel prices have more than doubled.

title: Supreme Court fines Centre for plea on CISF cop’s sacking case
content: The Supreme Court criticized the government for filing unnecessary appeals, imposing a Rs 25,000 cost on the Centre for challenging a High Court order. The High Court had reinstated a CISF official terminated for allegedly helping a couple elope, ruling the girl was an adult and married willingly. The apex court questioned the government's role in court pendency.

title: Ravi Varma’s ‘Yashoda & Krishna’ fetches record-shattering Rs 167 crore
content: Industrialist Cyrus S Poonawalla has set a new record for modern Indian art, acquiring Raja Ravi Varma's 'Yashoda and Krishna' for Rs 167.2 crore. This landmark sale, which more than doubled its estimate, highlights the enduring cultural significance of Varma's work. Poonawalla plans to make the national treasure available for public viewing.

title: Judicial officers will decide 60L Bengal claims by Apr 7, 47.3L completed: Supreme Court
content: The Supreme Court has been informed that all deleted voter claims in West Bengal will be decided by April 7. This addresses concerns about the upcoming assembly elections. Appellate tribunals have been formed to hear any objections. The court emphasized that judicial officers must remain independent and free from political interference. Further hearings are scheduled for April 6.

title: 51% of CCTVs China-made, Delhi plans phased removal over security concerns
content: Delhi government plans to phase out over 1.4 lakh Chinese-origin CCTV cameras, primarily from Hikvision, citing national security concerns. The move aims to replace them with secure, trusted systems, ensuring no disruption to the city's surveillance network. This decision contrasts with the previous administration's procurement approach.

title: Indian man appears in court charged with mowing down pedestrians in Derby
content: An Indian national, Sandhu Ponnachan, faces serious charges after allegedly driving a car into pedestrians in Derby, injuring seven. The 36-year-old, who moved to the UK in April 2025, appeared in court charged with multiple offenses including grievous bodily harm with intent. Four victims have since been released from hospital.

title: Ex-Pakistan batter slams PCB after Naseem Shah fined PKR 20mil for 'Queen' jibe
content: Former captain Younis Khan has criticized the Pakistan Cricket Board's PKR 20 million fine on Naseem Shah, deeming it excessive after the pacer deleted a controversial tweet and apologized. Khan believes leniency or a lesser penalty would have been more appropriate, warning of negative impacts on player morale.

title: Bad heir day: Son robs his father of Rs 10 lakh at gunpoint in Delhi, unmasked
content: A businessman's report of a Rs 10 lakh daylight robbery took a shocking turn when police apprehended the culprit: his own 20-year-old son. The son confessed to staging the heist to 'teach his father a lesson' after being denied money. The stolen cash was recovered from his grandmother's home.

title: Tiger Woods gets court approval to travel abroad for treatment after DUI
content: Tiger Woods has been granted permission by a Florida judge to travel outside the state and country as he seeks medical treatment following a DUI-related arrest. His legal team argued that specialized care and privacy concerns made overseas treatment necessary. While Woods faces ongoing charges, including refusal to submit to testing, the ruling allows him to prioritize recovery. The case continues, but the decision marks a significant step in balancing legal obligations with personal health needs.

title: Sooryavanshi's India debut loading? Zimbabwe series raises big question
content: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi’s sensational IPL rise, highlighted by a blistering 15-ball fifty, has ignited debate over a potential India debut in the Zimbabwe T20I series. His fearless batting and consistency have impressed experts, with Kamran Akmal and Mohammad Kaif backing a fast-track call-up. However, Ravichandran Ashwin has urged patience, stressing the need to manage expectations around the 15-year-old prodigy as selectors weigh risk and timing.

title: J&K govt announces revival of 120-yr-old power project
content: Jammu and Kashmir is reviving the historic 10.5MW Mohra Power Project, dormant since the 1990s. This century-old facility, crucial for Jhelum River dredging, is getting a modern upgrade. The project is a key part of a big plan to boost the region's energy output and bring this vital infrastructure back online.

title: Brittany Mahomes reacts to Randi Mahomes’ emotional post
content: Brittany Mahomes’ induction into the University of Texas at Tyler Athletics Hall of Fame highlights her own athletic journey, separate from her public life today. A former collegiate standout who briefly played professionally in Iceland, she remains connected to her roots. Her heartfelt speech and the support from Randi Mahomes reflect both personal pride and a continued commitment to uplifting women’s sports.

title: Fact check: Did Druski and Erika Kirk respond to viral skit?
content: Drew “Druski” Desbordes’ viral skit led to rumors of an online clash with Erika Kirk, but no real interaction happened. A fake screenshot showing comments between them spread on X, but it was proven false. No cease-and-desist was sent, and neither Druski nor Erika Kirk has responded publicly to each other.

title: Is Justin Gaethje out vs Ilia Topuria? Arman Tsarukyan hints replacement
content: April 1 once again proved to be one of the most confusing days in combat sports. Rumors spread quickly and fans struggled to separate fact from fiction. This year, the chaos centered around the UFC White House event on June 14. The historic card will feature a blockbuster lightweight title fight between Ilia Topuria and Justin Gaethje. However, a sudden social media post stirred major controversy in MMA fandom.

title: Defence budget under capital head fully utilised in FY2025-26
content: India's defence ministry has smartly deployed its revised capital expenditure of Rs 1.86 lakh crore for FY2025-26, mirroring the momentum from the previous year. This fiscal strategy highlights intense investments in aerial assets, ground defense technologies, and cutting-edge electronic warfare systems. Additionally, the endorsement of multiple new procurement strategies showcases a dynamic approach towards bolstering the nation’s defense arsenal.

title: Why Artemis II will not land on the Moon even though Nasa did it 50 years ago
content: NASA's Artemis II mission, a 10-day lunar flyby, marks humanity's return to deep space after 50 years. This crucial test flight validates the Orion spacecraft and Space Launch System rocket for future landings. Unlike Apollo's race against time, Artemis prioritizes long-term lunar presence and eventual Mars missions, emphasizing safety and sustainability over speed.

title: LSG vs DC: Sameer Rizvi’s unbeaten 70 guides Delhi Capitals to six-wicket victory
content: Sameer Rizvi's spectacular unbeaten 70, coupled with Tristan Stubbs' solid 39*, orchestrated a stunning turnaround for Delhi Capitals.  After a disastrous start at 26 for 4, the duo forged an unbroken 119-run partnership to chase down Lucknow Super Giants' 141 with ease, securing a memorable six-wicket victory.

title: Patrick-Brittany Mahomes hit with back-to-back losses despite Hall of Fame celebration
content: Patrick Mahomes, the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player, and his wife, Brittany Mahomes, recently celebrated her induction into the UT Tyler Athletics Hall of Fame. But it seems the high profile couple recently got some concerning news and it might have affected them as Patrick Mahomes’ recovers from brutal ACL and LCL tears ahead of the upcoming season in the NFL.

title: Rahul Arunoday Banerjee was rescued alive, no doctor was available: Makers on drowning incident
content: The makers of Bengali television serial Bhole Baba Par Karega have issued a statement following the tragic death of actor Rahul Arunoday Banerjee, expressing grief and assuring a transparent inquiry into the incident. Banerjee, 43, passed away on March 29 after allegedly drowning during a shoot at Talsari beach in Odisha’s Baleswar district.

title: Judicial officers will decide 60 lakh Bengal claims by April 7, 47.3L completed, says SC
content: judicial officers — 500 from Bengal and another 200 from Odisha and Jharkhand — have decided 47,30,000 by Wednesday morning . the pending objections to deletion of names from voters’ lists are likely to be adjudicated by April 7 .

title: Humans return to the Moon’s doorstep: Just hours to go for Artemis II launch
content: Chethan Kumar is a Senior Assistant Editor with the Times of India. Aside from specialising in Space & Science, he has reported extensively on varied topics, with special focus on defence, policy and data stories. He has covered multiple elections, too. As a young democracy grows out of adolescence, Chethan feels, there are reels of tales emerging which need to be captured. To do this, he alternates between the mundane goings-on of the Common Man and the wonder-filled worlds of scientists and scamsters, politicians and soldiers. In a career spanning nearly 18 years, he has reported from multiple datelines — Houston, Florida, Kochi, Hyderabad, Chennai, Sriharikota (AP), NH-1 (J&K Highway), New Delhi, Ahmedabad, Raichur, Bhatkal, Mysuru, Chamarajanagar, to name a few —  but is based out of Bengaluru, India’s science capital that also hosts the ISRO HQ. title: Navy gets ‘Malwan’ anti-sub warfare ship, first next-gen offshore patrol vessel
content: 'Malwan' is the second anti-submarine warfare shallow water craft built by Cochin Shipyard Limited in Kochi . on the same day, the Navy also launched a next-generation offshore patrol vessel built at Goa Shipyard . INS Malwan draws its name from the coastal town of Malwan in Maharashtra .

title: Divisional rankings: Grasso, Pyfer elevate their standing in knockout performances
content: the main event pitted two-time former middleweight champion Israel Adesanya against rising Joe Pyfer . he scored a second-round knockout for his fourth straight victory . former women's flyweight champion Alexa Grasso finished fellow top-10 fighter Maycee Barber in the first round .

title: Why did Browns HC Todd Monken miss the NFL coaches photo? A haircut
content: monken was one of two coaches missing from the NFL's annual coaches photo . the photo was taken immediately after a coaches meeting . monken skipped to receive a fresh cut for the group photo, which was scheduled to be taken at noon .

title: UConn odds-on title favorite, 1-seeds all that remain in women's tournament
content: the women's college basketball tournament will be with -160 odds . it will be its longest since the calendar flipped to 2026 . in January, Geno Auriemma's squad was -190 to win the title . UCLA has fallen to the bottom of the odds board at +600 .

title: UFL Power Rankings: Which Week 1 winner tops the list, plus each team's MVP
content: a biweekly look at how all eight teams stack up against each other . we've scrapped the MVP acronym this week and dubbed a player from each franchise as the MIPITU: Most important player in the universe .

title: Top newcomers for Notre Dame and every Big Ten team; what coaches, GMs are saying
content: coach Curt Cignetti says he ripped Michigan State transfer Nick Marsh for wearing gold cleats to practice . no conference in 2025 better felt how quality newcomers can reshape rosters like the Big Ten .

title: MMA pound-for-pound rankings: Grasso secures her position in women's top 10
content: Grasso entered the bout at no. 10 despite not having won a fight in nearly three years . the former women's flyweight champion remains in the 10th spot . a fighter must have competed over the past 12 months or have an upcoming fight booked .

title: LeBron James confirms breaking driveway backboard vs. Bronny
content: leBron James is first father-son team to record assist to each other . the lakers beat the Brooklyn Nets 116-99 on a one-on-one game . he stuffed the scorebook with 21 points, 10 rebounds and 12 assists .

title: Draymond Green reflects on his future amid uncertainty in Golden State
content: the Golden State Warriors were two games above .500 but stumbling in the wrong direction . they had lost three of five coming out of the All-Star break . but they built a 17-point first-half lead .

title: Chris Pronger on Auston Matthews hit, future of NHL Player Safety
content: Chris Pronger has a unique perspective on NHL player safety . he's like an inmate that eventually became a warden at the prison . Pronger was suspended for slashing, high sticking, hitting to the head, kicking and perhaps most infamously stepping on Ryan Kesler with his skate .

title: Player ratings: Pulisic 3/10 in USMNT's disappointing loss to Portugal
content: the united states lost 2-0 to Portugal in a friendly at the Mercedes-Benz Stadium . the visitors eventually took the lead in the 37th minute when Francisco Trinco slotted a shot past goalkeeper Matt Freese . Mauricio Pochettino and his roster will now begin final prepa .

title: 'There's not one path': The unexpected rise of Keaton Wagler at Illinois
content: a hint of exasperation in underwood's voice as he ran through the well-worn tropes about Keaton Wagler . the coach is sensitive to minimizing Wagler's journey, or separating him from the group of freshmen who have taken over the men's college basketball season . underwood: "we found him. He fit us"

title: 2026 rankings: Profiling the top 35 QBs
content: the 2024 NFL MVP has finished in the top 10 in passing TDs six seasons in a row and remains a major threat with his legs . despite seeing less passing volume the past two seasons (14th or lower in pass attempts both years), he has finished second among quarterbacks in fantasy points . his 21.4 fantasy points per game in 2025 was actually his lowest since 2019 .
